/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,librospack.so -o /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rospack/lib/librospack.so CMakeFiles/rospack.dir/src/rospack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rospack.dir/src/rospack_backcompat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rospack.dir/src/rospack_cmdline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rospack.dir/src/utils.cpp.o  -ltinyxml2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -lpython3.10
